events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today, marking over three decades as a singer, actress, and dancer.

angles.name: J.Lo's Enduring Reign
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, Jennifer Lopez is 57 today! Which J.Lo track gets you on the dancefloor every time?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video, forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: The Day Music Changed
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV hit the airwaves with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star, or just give us more ways to love music?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation. What's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal event in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969, featuring 32 acts and attracting over 460,000 people.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off three days of peace, love, and iconic music. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the one and only King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley. His music lives on. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who died on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25, after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost a hip-hop legend. Tupac Shakur's lyrics and legacy continue to resonate. What's his most impactful track for you?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Forever Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. His guitar still screams! What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, featuring their famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Across Abbey Road
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles walked into history with 'Abbey Road'. The album, the cover, the legend. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Hynde's Enduring Edge
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad Fer It, Liam!
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Which of his tunes is your ultimate singalong?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine A World
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: The first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put 1,000 songs in your pocket and changed everything.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks Global James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini to 007 and over six decades of iconic espionage, thrilling gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend and peace activist, John Lennon, born October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the life and enduring music of John Lennon. His message of peace still resonates.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Turns 87
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th Birthday to the one and only John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty, a true master of comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968, showcasing the band's diverse musical directions.

angles.name: Unpacking The White Album
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles gave us the sprawling, eclectic 'White Album'. Which track from this double LP masterpiece is your go-to?
